parameters-en.Balance A: Adjusts the left/right stereo balance (pan) of the signal sent to Path A (upper). By default, the signal before the Split > Y block is sent evenly to both Path A and Path B, both in stereo. If you set Balance A to L 100 and Balance B to R 100, the Split > Y block splits the stereo signal into two mono signals--left to Path A and right to Path B.
parameters-en.Balance B: Adjusts the left/right stereo balance (pan) of the signal sent to Path B (lower). By default, the signal before the Split > Y block is sent evenly to both Path A and Path B, both in stereo. If you set Balance A to L 100 and Balance B to R 100, the Split > Y block splits the stereo signal into two mono signals--left to Path A and right to Path B.
